title: Tricky-Triple
description:
ModPacks constructed using Minecraft-1.21-Fabric.
Designed to enhance the vanilla playing experience and add many visual effects, new cubes and new ways to play!
body:
### Thanks:
Xaero.zip - [sakura7403](https://afdian.com/a/sakura7403) - [Source](https://www.bilibili.com/opus/900500607268290596) - [allow(zh_cn)](https://i.postimg.cc/kDrrR0V5/IMG-20240725-144230.jpg)  
inventoryhud.fabric.1.21-3.4.23.jar - [inventory-hud](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge)  
Tricky-Triple.zip - [tricky-triple-tran](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tricky-triple-tran)  
ComplementaryReimagined - [complementary-reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)  
Any problems caused by `ComplementaryReimagined` in this ModPacks are my responsibility.
In case of problems, you will get support&help from this ModPack developer.

# Tricky-Triple
> A **Vanilla Plus** ModPacks.
## Main
![Tricky-Triple-Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/420411a3f2954ab6ae1bfb8f610c266d4a312a17.png)

**Look at this picture!**  
**Grass** - Vanilla  
**Flower** - means "Plus"  
**Wood**(background)&**Grass-edge** - Sth. New!  
~~_(Okay. I konw that's a little far-fetched.)_~~  

In this ModPacks, you can experience many new ways to play, new blocks, and new animations!
### new blocks
![Some Blocks](https://i.postimg.cc/PJTGNnkN/block.png)
### landscaping
![A pretty landscape picture. In a birch forest, the sun is shining and the fallen leaves are colorful.](https://i.postimg.cc/GmZ5HnFr/landscaping-2.png)

## Used
You need MC1.21 & Fabric(New)
